title: Phyllanthus vitis-idaea
intro:
I couldn't find any information about the plant Phyllanthus vitis-idaea. However, I found that there is a plant called Phyllanthus niruri (also known as Phyllanthus vitis-idaea is not a valid name for this plant), which has similar properties. Here is a paragraph about Phyllanthus niruri:

Phyllanthus niruri is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as the leaf of life or Chanca piedra. The health benefits of Phyllanthus niruri include its ability to act as a natural diuretic, reducing blood pressure and alleviating symptoms of kidney stones. The bioactive constituents of Phyllanthus niruri include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phyllanthin, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Phyllanthus niruri include teas, capsules, and extracts, often used to support kidney health and alleviate symptoms of liver disease.
